# Bridge AI Solutions

Bridge AI Solutions is a custom software consultancy that builds AI-powered tools and automations for small B2B service businesses in the United States.

## What We Do

We identify your biggest operational bottleneck and build a real, custom AI-powered solution around it — then hand it off so you own the code, the data, and everything in it. No lock-in.

## Who We Serve

Small B2B service businesses, typically 1–20 people, spending significant hours each week on manual, repetitive work. Common industries: professional services, financial advisory, healthcare operations, marketing agencies.

## Services

- Focused Build: One targeted automation problem, delivered in ~1 week
- Signature Build: Multi-system AI platform, delivered in 3–4 weeks
